title: Great commuter sneaker
review_text: I walk 20 minutes to work and these handle light rain perfectly. Feet stay dry and comfortable all day. The grip on wet sidewalks is solid too.

title: Not waterproof - misleading
review_text: Wore these in a heavy rainstorm and my socks were soaked within 10 minutes. The listing says water resistant but I expected more protection for the price. Fine for light drizzle I guess.

title: Perfect for Pacific Northwest
review_text: Living in Seattle, I need shoes that handle drizzle. These are perfect for that. I re-spray them with DWR every few months and they still bead water. Not for hiking in the rain though.

title: Comfortable but runs warm
review_text: Love the water resistance and the look. Only downside is they feel a bit warm in summer because of the treated upper. Great for fall and spring though.

title: Solid everyday shoe
review_text: Good looking sneaker that handles puddles and light rain. The toe box is roomier than my AeroFlex Runners which I appreciate. Just remember to re-treat the DWR coating.

title: DWR wore off fast
review_text: Water beaded off great for the first month. After that, the upper started absorbing water in rain. Had to buy DWR spray to re-treat. Works again now but wish it lasted longer out of the box.

title: Best wet-weather sneaker I own
review_text: I've tried several water resistant shoes and these are the best balance of comfort, style, and actual water protection. The wet-grip sole is no joke either. Highly recommend for rainy day errands.
